Package com.enovka.gemini4j.resource.builder

Class PartBuilder

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.enovka.gemini4j.resource.builder.PartBuilder
  • public class PartBuilder
extends Object
    Builder for creating Part instances.
    Since:
    0.0.2
    Author:
    Everson Novka <enovka@gmail.com>

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field Description
      FileData fileData  
      FunctionCall functionCall  
      FunctionResponse functionResponse  
      Blob inlineData

      Constructors 
      Constructor Description
      PartBuilder​(ContentBuilder contentBuilder)
      Constructor for the PartBuilder.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      ContentBuilder and()
      Adds the built Part instance to the list of parts in the parent builder.
      Part build()
      Builds a Part instance based on the configured parameters.
      FileDataBuilder withFileData()
      Creates a new FileDataBuilder for building the file data.
      PartBuilder withFileData​(FileData fileData)
      Sets the file data for the part.
      FunctionCallBuilder withFunctionCall()
      Creates a new FunctionCallBuilder for building the function call.
      PartBuilder withFunctionCall​(FunctionCall functionCall)
      Sets the function call for the part.
      FunctionResponseBuilder withFunctionResponse()
      Creates a new FunctionResponseBuilder for building the function response.
      PartBuilder withFunctionResponse​(FunctionResponse functionResponse)
      Sets the function response for the part.
      BlobBuilder withInlineData()
      Creates a new BlobBuilder for building the inline data.
      PartBuilder withInlineData​(Blob inlineData)
      Sets the inline data for the part.
      PartBuilder withText​(String text)
      Sets the inline text for the part.

      • build

        public Part build()
        Builds a Part instance based on the configured parameters.
        Returns:
        The built Part instance.

      • and

        public ContentBuilder and()
        Adds the built Part instance to the list of parts in the parent builder.
        Returns:
        The parent ContentBuilder instance for method chaining.
